subject: fix(hero): restore tagline glow animation with swapped colors
body:
Previous commit incorrectly removed the glow animation entirely.
Restored text-glow keyframes with colors swapped so the tagline
glows from muted gray and lands on sky blue (#38bdf8). Added
forwards fill mode so the final sky blue color persists.

Tags: styling, hero, animation
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: hero-styling
Semver: patch

title: restore tagline glow animation with swapped colors
